overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a desert wasteland toward Night City. The camera follows the car from a third-person perspective as it navigates cracked asphalt roads, passes industrial solar arrays, and merges onto a multi-lane highway approaching the futuristic metropolis skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert industrial road with solar arrays

agents.ego_description: following a vehicle along a cracked desert road flanked by industrial solar arrays and power lines

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead driving along the desert road at moderate speed

entered.detail: large industrial solar array structures on hillside
tall metal pylons with multiple power lines running parallel to road
weathered asphalt with visible cracks and yellow dividing lines
futuristic metropolis with tall skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a cracked desert road through an industrial wasteland. Solar panel farms and power transmission towers line the left side while the futuristic Night City skyline looms in the distant right. The scene is bright and arid with sparse desert vegetation.

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn at desert intersection onto wider road
passing other vehicles while merging onto the main highway approach

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection and accelerating onto the wider highway approach

notable_agents.action: red vehicle passing on the left side of the intersection

entered.detail: road junction with merging traffic lanes and directional markings
metal safety barriers along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a highway intersection and executes a sharp right turn onto a wider road. Other vehicles are present at the junction. The solar panel farms exit the frame as the car merges onto the main highway approach toward the city, with guardrails now visible along the roadside.

events.description: entering major highway infrastructure with overpasses and signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the multi-lane highway toward the city skyline

entered.detail: elevated concrete bridge crossing over the highway
large overhead sign structure spanning the road
advertising structures along the highway shoulder

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a wide multi-lane highway with guardrails and overhead signs. The Night City skyline grows larger and more detailed on the right. The road passes under concrete overpasses and alongside industrial billboards as the urban perimeter approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with directional signage approaching city center

events.description: passing under large highway sign gantries indicating directions to city center districts

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the final highway approach to Night City

entered.detail: massive overhead sign structure with directional arrows pointing to Night City districts
large electronic advertisement display showing a face

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the final stretch of highway with large directional sign gantries spanning the road. The Night City skyline now dominates the right side of the frame with individual skyscrapers clearly visible. Digital billboards and advanced highway infrastructure indicate proximity to the metropolis center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from a desolate industrial wasteland toward the towering skyline of Night City. It begins on a cracked desert road lined with solar panel farms and power transmission towers under a bright, arid sky. As the vehicle reaches a highway intersection, it executes a sharp right turn, leaving the solar arrays behind to merge onto a wider road flanked by guardrails. The scene then expands into a multi-lane highway, passing under concrete overpasses and industrial billboards as the distant city skyline grows larger and more detailed. Finally, the camera follows the car beneath large directional sign gantries and digital billboards, where the massive skyscrapers of the metropolis center now dominate the horizon.
